text:
Write me a 4 panel comic with the follwing setup 

Blue is casting a spell on pink to make him more powerful than ever. He thinks he's finally going to be all powerful, but it turns out to only heal his broken horn. The dragon tell him its because he's already perfect and he doesnt want his friend to change. The friend is touched but annoued

projects.name: Xid and Thanatos comic
projects.description: comic series featuring dragon characters Xid and Thanatos; themes of friendship and self-acceptance

goals.description: write 4 panel comic about a healing spell and friendship between two dragon characters

preferences.description: friendship and emotional themes in comics

text:
Simplify this comic and make it funnier

Xid: With this spell I'll achieve my perfect body!
Xid: I'll be more powerful than ever!

Xid: What happened? I feel the same. 
Thanatos: Yeah, I just healed your horn.

Thanatos: You're already perfect, best buddy!
Xid: Ah, gee..

Xid: But couldn't you at least make me taller?
Thanatos: No.

projects.name: Xid and Thanatos comic
projects.description: comic series featuring dragon characters Xid and Thanatos

goals.description: simplify and make the Xid and Thanatos comic funnier

preferences.description: simple and funny comic style
iterative refinement of existing drafts rather than starting over

text:
Simplify this comic
Xid: With this spell I'll achieve my perfect body!
Xid: I feel it working! I'm gonna be more powerful than ever!

Xid: What happened? I feel the same. 
Thanatos: Yeah, I just healed your horn.

Thanatos: Cuz You're already perfect, best buddy!
Xid: Ah, gee..

Xid: Couldn't you at least give me abs?
Thanatos: No.

projects.name: Xid and Thanatos comic
projects.description: comic series featuring dragon characters Xid and Thanatos

goals.description: further simplify the Xid and Thanatos comic script

preferences.description: simple and concise comic scripts
iterative refinement of existing drafts rather than starting over

text: Here is a version of the comic we were talking about that I liked, can we make it funnier? THe final panel feels like its missing a joke, please help me make several options that would be funnier

projects.name: book club monster comic
projects.description: comic about a book club featuring monster characters including a dragon

goals.description: make the final panel of the book club comic funnier

preferences.description: humor and jokes in comics
prefers being given multiple options to choose from

text: Give me a good YT clickbait title for the following comic featuring three monsters studying for a test

projects.name: monster studying comic
projects.description: comic featuring skeleton, dragon, and werewolf studying for a test; published on YouTube

goals.description: create a YouTube clickbait title for the monster studying comic

preferences.description: publishes comic content on YouTube

text:
Reduce the following script to being only 7 lines

I've uncovered a giant conspiracy! 

There's a secret society of lizard people living under our city! 

It's not a secret. 
Yeah, lizardtown has great food. 
What?!

How come I've never heard of it before?
We're shy people.

[]
This IS a nice neighborhood. 
What's wrong you've barely touched your meat!

projects.name: lizard people conspiracy script
projects.description: comedy script about a secret lizard society living underground

goals.description: reduce the lizard people script to 7 lines

preferences.description: very short and punchy scripts with maximum compression

constraints.description: script must be reduced to only 7 lines

projects.name: lizard people conspiracy script
projects.description: comedy script about lizard society; ongoing simplification

goals.description: simplify the lizard people conspiracy script

preferences.description: simple and concise scripts
iterative refinement of existing drafts rather than starting over

text:
Please sumarize this in a logline 

They've canceled my flight and I must get home immediately!

You're the only one that can fly through this snow storm!
And what's so urgent that you'd offer me your servitude?

My vacation. 

I've been looking forward to playing games and drinking beer all year!
Rest is important, I respect that.

projects.name: flight vacation script
projects.description: short comedy script about a cancelled flight; character desperate to get home for vacation

goals.description: summarize the flight vacation script as a logline

preferences.description: uses logline format to distill scripts to their core concept
comedy based on mundane motivations in high-stakes situations

text: Here's what Mei actually looks like: Mei is a young woman, presumably a teenager. She has short chin-length black hair with two small pigtails, straight bangs, and two green highlights framing her face. The back of her hair slightly spikes out. The silhouette of her hair resembles the head of a dragon, with her pigtails forming the horns. She wears pale pink lipstick. A comical close up implies Mei has green eyes.

projects.name: Lego Monkie Kid fan fiction
projects.description: fan fiction based on Lego Monkie Kid featuring characters Mei, MK, Wukong, Spider Queen, Macaque, Ao Lie

goals.description: establish accurate visual character description of Mei for the fan fiction

preferences.description: canon-accurate character portrayals that match source material

text: Let's start the scene with them already defeated and being dragged before her. Both are scared but Wukong is "playing dumb to lighten the mood", trying to get under Spider Queen's skin. Macaque is very aware of how much danger they're in and keeps hissing at Wukong to shut his trap. Spider Queen of course feels very triumphant that her army managed to take down the mighty Sun Wukong and now he's her prisoner, at her mercy. Let's rewrite the summary with that in mind.

projects.name: Lego Monkie Kid fan fiction
projects.description: fan fiction; Spider Queen arc where Wukong and Macaque are captured

goals.description: write scene where Wukong and Macaque are brought before Spider Queen as prisoners

preferences.description: scenes that balance humor and tension simultaneously
distinct and consistent character voices across scenes

constraints.description: Wukong must play dumb to lighten mood; Macaque must be serious and anxious

text: Mei goes off, shouting at the lieutenant that Ao Lie is her cousin and she knows him and he's way too clumsy to be a rebel. MK has to hold her back. The lieutenant looks completely unimpressed and shoos them away. I'd like this scene to have an underlying sense of danger but still be somewhat comedic as Mei goes over the top insisting her cousin is innocent. Let's write that scene with details and dialogue.

projects.name: Lego Monkie Kid fan fiction
projects.description: fan fiction; Mei defending Ao Lie from rebel accusations before a lieutenant

goals.description: write scene with Mei defending Ao Lie with details and dialogue

preferences.description: tonal complexity in scenes: danger and comedy coexist
detailed scenes written with full dialogue

text: Back in the prison: Ao Lie makes one last desperate attempt to tell a guard he's not Bai Long Ma. The guard - the same spider demon from earlier - enters Ao Lie's cell and bites him. The venom makes Ao Lie weak and sick as the demon leaves him alone in the cell again. Ao Lie, panicking, asks if he's going to die. The demon answers that Ao Lie will wish he could die until the venom wears off. Let's write that scene with details and dialogue.

projects.name: Lego Monkie Kid fan fiction
projects.description: fan fiction; prison arc where Ao Lie is poisoned by a spider demon guard

goals.description: write prison scene where Ao Lie is bitten and poisoned by the spider demon guard

preferences.description: detailed scenes written with full dialogue
does not shy away from dark and tense scenes involving character suffering

constraints.description: must use the same spider demon guard established in a previous scene for story continuity

text: I have a plan for how I want the story to go. I just want your help visualizing it and drafting a few scenes. I'll start by describing the setting.

entities.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

projects.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story
projects.description: alternate universe fan fiction with a pre-planned story arc; user owns the plot direction

goals.description: visualize and draft specific scenes for the pre-planned Sun Wukong and MK AU story

preferences.description: retains full creative control over plot; uses AI only for scene drafting and visualization

relations.target: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

text: Setting: a mountain, similar to Flower-Fruit Mountain, though not quite the same. Sun Wukong is king of the mountain and is raising his son, MK, to be the next king someday. He, MK, and the royal guard and servant monkeys all have golden fur - most of the others on the mountain have dark fur, including MK's two best friends, Mei and Tang. MK leads a happy life, if somewhat isolated, as he doesn't really interact with "commoners" beyond Mei and Tang. He's noticed they seem afraid of his father Sun Wukong but just assumes that's because he's the king and is immensely powerful.

entities.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

projects.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story
projects.description: AU where Sun Wukong is king raising MK as prince; golden-fur royals vs dark-fur commoners; MK is sheltered with friends Mei and Tang

goals.description: establish world-building and social structure for the AU story

preferences.description: rich world-building with clear internal rules and social hierarchy
character naivety and isolation as story setup elements

constraints.description: world rules must stay internally consistent: golden fur marks royalty, dark fur marks commoners

relations.target: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

text: So, in the first scene of the story, a very young MK (maybe 5 years old) wakes up to hearing the whole mountain groaning as though it's moving, though it isn't. He gets scared and calls for his father. A few minutes later, the sounds stop and Sun Wukong comes to check on him, asking what's wrong. MK tells him about the scary noises. Wukong has a moment of realization and horror that's quickly replaced by fatherly instinct, reassuring MK that everything's fine and he's sure the scary noises won't come back.

entities.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

projects.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story
projects.description: opening scene: young MK frightened by mysterious mountain sounds; Wukong hides his horror to protect MK

goals.description: write opening scene establishing young MK's innocence and Wukong's protective but secretive parenting

preferences.description: opens stories with quiet emotional scenes before escalating conflict
characters that conceal their true feelings to protect others

constraints.description: Wukong must conceal his true reaction; MK must remain unaware of the real danger

relations.target: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

text: Wukong looks down at MK and Macaque, then tells his army to round up the able-bodied monkeys from the village. MK shouts in protest as Macaque groans. One of the golden-haired soldiers asks Wukong what they should do with MK and Macaque. Wukong looks at Macaque and says "You, I can't kill" - he looks at MK and says "You, I won't kill" - and orders the soldiers to hold them until he's finished with the village, and then to let them go. Let's write that whole scene with details and dialogue.

entities.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story

projects.name: Sun Wukong and MK AU story
projects.description: late-story arc: Wukong as villain confronting MK and Macaque; spares both for distinct personal reasons

goals.description: write confrontation scene between villainous Wukong and MK and Macaque with full dialogue

preferences.description: morally complex villain scenes that preserve emotional ties between characters
detailed scenes written with full dialogue

constraints.description: Wukong must spare both MK and Macaque with their specified distinct reasons: cannot kill Macaque, will not kill MK

relations.target: Sun Wukong and MK AU story
